text:
Care: Toileting Hygiene Ability (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 Toileting hygiene: The ability to maintain perineal hygiene, adjust clothes before and after voiding or having a bowel movement. If managing an ostomy, include wiping the opening but not managing equipment. effective 10/01/2019
760 GG0170B5_SIT_INTRIM_CD GG0170B5_SIT_INTRIM_CD GG0170B5 Mobility: Sit to Lying Ability (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 Sit to lying: The ability to move from sitting on side of bed to lying flat on the bed. effective
